stories.title: Discover & Configure Quality Tools for Lua
acceptanceCriteria: Determine the appropriate Lua formatting command (e.g., stylua)
Determine the appropriate Lua linting command (e.g., selene or luacheck)
Determine the appropriate Lua testing and coverage command (e.g., busted with luacov, or plenary.busted)
Write configuration files for these tools if they don't exist (e.g., .stylua.toml) in the project root

stories.title: Create the Stop Hook Script
acceptanceCriteria: Script `.claude/hooks/stop` is created and made executable (`chmod +x`)
Script redirects output to stderr and exits with 0 if no git changes exist
Script runs the format check. On failure, exits with code 2 and prints error.
Script runs the lint check. On failure, exits with code 2 and prints error.
Script runs the test suite with coverage. On failure or if coverage < 90%, exits with code 2 and prints error.
Script checks if Lua code was modified without corresponding changes in `README.md` or `doc/`. If true, exits with code 2 advising to update docs.
On success, exits with code 2 and prompts the agent to commit and push the changes.

stories.title: Bind Hook in .claude/settings.json
acceptanceCriteria: It contains the 'Stop' hook configuration pointing to the `.claude/hooks/stop` bash script
The configuration follows the exact JSON structure specified in the skill instructions
